generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist payload to monitor payload stability and dynamics during crane operation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed in the lab environment to account for external disturbances affecting crane payload stability."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks joint angles and payload position via encoders and position sensors for real-time state estimation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures motor currents to detect overload conditions, actuator faults, or energy consumption patterns."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance PayloadForceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Senses payload weight and force dynamics to validate kinematic model assumptions and detect payload shifts."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PayloadForceData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance PayloadForceData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PayloadForceSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor, MotorCurrentSensor, PayloadForceSensor
    base:desc "Aggregated time-series data from all crane sensors transmitted via Arduino to TimescaleDB for historical logging."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D kinematic representation of the lab-scale gantry crane including joint definitions, payload constraints, and trajectory paths created in Autodesk Fusion 360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADModelEnabler, SimulationServiceEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic model simulating crane movements, payload dynamics, and trajectory validation for optimal control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAlgorithmEnabler, TrajectoryPlanningEnabler
]

instance HistoricalCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series archive of crane operational data (joint angles, motor currents, payload position) stored in TimescaleDB for post-mortem analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAnalysisEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance RealTimeTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streaming sensor data from the physical crane fused with simulation outputs for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, MotorCurrentData, PayloadForceData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance DiscrepancyMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed validation metrics (position error, velocity drift) between physical and digital twin states for model-plant mismatch detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance FaultPatternsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical fault signatures and anomaly tags derived from machine learning models trained on crane operational data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CADModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for creating and maintaining the 3D kinematic model of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SimulationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation service executing trajectory simulations using the kinematic model for pre-deployment validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, TrajectoryPlanningService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library (gantrylib) implementing model-based control algorithms (PID, MPC) for optimal crane motion trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms generating collision-free, time-optimal paths for crane payload transportation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance DataAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB with SQL-like query capabilities for filtering crane operational data by time, payload mass, or control mode."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based dashboard and ROS RViz/Unity integration for real-time and historical visualization of crane state."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based state estimation and residual analysis for detecting model-plant mismatches in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning models (SVM, Isolation Forests) and rule-based systems for identifying crane faults and anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto broker facilitating low-latency bidirectional communication between physical crane and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance DockerContainerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of all digital twin services for modularity, scalability, and reproducibility."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArduinoInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino-based microcontroller interfacing crane sensors and actuators with the digital twin via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements model-based control algorithms (PID, MPC) to optimize crane motion trajectories, payload stability, and energy efficiency using precomputed control inputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, DisturbanceRejectionAction, ConstraintHandlingAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously records time-series data from the physical crane (joint angles, motor currents, payload position) in TimescaleDB for post-mortem analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataFusionInsight, QueryableArchiveInsight, AnomalyTaggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and historical visualization of crane state via interactive dashboards and 3D CAD renderings synchronized with physical movements."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveTelemetryInsight, AnimationSyncInsight, CustomizableViewsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements real-time synchronization and discrepancy detection between physical and digital twins using state estimation and residual analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight, DiscrepancyDetectionInsight, AdaptiveCorrectionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors crane for abnormal behaviors (motor stalls, cable slack) using machine learning models and rule-based systems for predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultIsolationInsight, SeverityScoringInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collision-free, time-optimal paths generated for crane payload transportation under hardware constraints."
]

instance DisturbanceRejectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Mitigates external disturbances (wind, payload shifts) via closed-loop feedback from the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConstraintHandlingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enforces hardware limits (joint velocity, torque) to prevent physical damage during operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataFusionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Combined sensor data with simulation outputs to cross-validate physical and digital twin states."
]

instance QueryableArchiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SQL-like querying capabilities for filtering crane operational data by time, payload mass, or control mode."
]

instance AnomalyTaggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Flags outliers or deviations (sudden velocity spikes) for fault diagnosis in historical data."
]

instance LiveTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming display of crane position, payload state, and operational metrics on web/desktop interfaces."
]

instance AnimationSyncInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D CAD model rendering synchronized with physical crane movements using ROS RViz or Unity."
]

instance CustomizableViewsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "User-defined metrics (energy consumption, control error) for domain-specific analysis of crane operations."
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fused sensor data with kinematic model to estimate physical crane state using Kalman filters."
]

instance DiscrepancyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed discrepancy metrics (position error, velocity drift) to detect model-plant mismatches."
]

instance AdaptiveCorrectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of digital twin parameters to minimize validation errors between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance FaultIsolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of faulty actuators/sensors (e.g., jammed joint, broken encoder) based on anomaly patterns."
]

instance SeverityScoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Risk level assignment (low/medium/high) for detected faults based on impact analysis."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LateralMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor driving the cart's lateral movement along the gantry beam with precise position control."
]

instance HoistingMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling the hoist mechanism for payload lifting with force feedback for stability."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end for secure pickup and release of container pucks during transportation."
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based interface for low-level control of crane actuators and sensor data acquisition."
]

instance TMC4671MotorDriver : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Precision motor driver board for closed-loop control of crane actuators with feedback integration."
]

// C1: Environment
instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled lab environment housing the physical gantry crane system with modular, reproducible design for research and education."
    base:contains PhysicalCraneComponent, CraneControllerComponent, DigitalTwinContainerComponent
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical gantry crane with kinematic constraints representative of industrial systems but simplified for lab-scale experimentation."
]

instance CraneControllerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated hardware/software system interfacing crane actuators and sensors for real-time closed-loop control."
]

    base:desc "Centralized containerized deployment of all digital twin services on a single computer for unified operation."
]

// Added missing services that were referenced but not defined
instance TrajectoryVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides visualization of trajectory paths and crane movements for monitoring and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnimationSyncInsight, CustomizableViewsInsight
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates collision-free, time-optimal paths for crane payload transportation."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Control Application** and **Trajectory Generator Service** generate and transmit optimized movement trajectories to the **Physical Crane Interface**, which translates these into control commands for the physical crane. The **Trajectory Generator Service** leverages a kinematics model to produce trajectories designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of movement. The **Continuous Validation Service** monitors executed trajectories by comparing real-time measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics to assess deviations. If discrepancies exceed an unspecified threshold, operators are notified via the **Dashboard** for corrective action. No explicit details are provided on command types, message formats, validation/authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, or conflict resolution protocols beyond the distance metric comparison and operator notification. Command execution confirmation is implied through the validation process but not explicitly described."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents follow an **ad-hoc, component-based orchestration** rather than a standardized framework. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar uses a **hybrid architecture** combining:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for structured data storage,
  - **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for **event-driven communication** between physical sensors and the digital twin,
  - **Virtual machines (VMs) with prerecorded data** for offline simulation and behavioral adaptation.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs a **Microsoft Azure-based pipeline** with **AutomationML** for model-driven digital twin engineering, integrating:
  - **Raspberry Pi sensors** for real-time data acquisition,
  - **Simulation, prediction, and runtime visualization services** (likely deployed as microservices or containers),
  - **Azure tools** for orchestration (e.g., cloud-based workflow management).
  The **gantry crane system** (logistics/cyber-physical domain) is described using **C4 Model architecture**, implying a **containerized or modular decomposition** of components (e.g., crane control, container tracking, and coordination services). **Resource management** is not explicitly detailed, but the reliance on **virtualization/containerization** (e.g., VMs, Raspberry Pi) suggests **lightweight, scalable deployment**. **System-wide coordination** appears to be **use-case-specific**, with no mention of a unified framework; instead, **message brokers (ActiveMQ) and cloud platforms (Azure)** serve as integration backbones. The exemplars collectively demonstrate a **loosely coupled, domain-agnostic constellation** prioritizing **flexibility over standardization**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a **Continuous Validation Service** that performs real-time comparisons between executed trajectories (derived from sensor data) and simulated trajectories (generated by the Simulation Service). This service quantifies discrepancies to identify sources of uncertainty, such as sensor noise, environmental disturbances, or model inaccuracies. Error detection mechanisms include threshold-based alerts for deviations exceeding predefined tolerances, triggering corrective actions such as recalibration of the Simulation Service or adjustments to control parameters. Quality assurance processes involve periodic validation of CAD models against physical measurements and iterative refinement of the Simulation Service to minimize prediction errors, ensuring high fidelity in the Digital Twin's representation of the gantry crane's behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **MQTT Broker** facilitates signaling between services within the Digital Twin system, enabling asynchronous communication for trajectory generation, simulation, and validation processes. The **Physical Crane Interface** is implemented as a Python program connecting to the crane controllers, though no specific communication protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) or network topology details are provided. The **TimescaleDB database** serves as the central data repository for all system-generated data, with no mention of bandwidth, latency, or redundancy mechanisms. Security protocols for network communication are not specified, nor are details on network architecture (e.g., LAN, WAN) or reliability assurances beyond the implicit need for continuous operation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (co-located with the **Physical Crane**), with the following technical details:
  - **Hosting Platform**: Local servers or high-performance workstations running Python services (**Control Application**, **Logging Application**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, etc.). The **Database** (**TimescaleDB**) is deployed as a dedicated instance for time-series data.
  - **Computational Requirements**:
    - **Trajectory Generation**: Moderate CPU/GPU resources for real-time kinematic calculations (e.g., solving inverse kinematics for optimal paths).
    - **Simulation Service**: Requires sufficient RAM/CPU to model crane dynamics (e.g., rigid-body physics simulations).
    - **Dashboard**: Lightweight (Grafana) with minimal overhead.
  - **Storage Requirements**: **TimescaleDB** scales with historical data needs; no explicit limits are stated, but time-series compression is likely applied.
  - **Scalability Mechanisms**: Vertical scaling (e.g., upgrading server hardware) is implied for the **Database** and computationally intensive services. Horizontal scaling (e.g., MQTT broker clustering) is not mentioned.
  - **Deployment Models**: Monolithic Python services with no explicit containerization (though the C4 model uses 'containers' as abstractions, not Docker). Services are likely deployed as standalone processes or virtual machines.
  - **Availability/Reliability Assurance**: Achieved via:
    - **Continuous Validation Service** (proactive monitoring of trajectory deviations).
    - **Dashboard alerts** for operator intervention.
    - **TimescaleDB’s built-in redundancy** (if configured). No explicit HA clustering or backup strategies are described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit **limited but targeted horizontal integration** with external systems, primarily through **domain-specific protocols and cloud/edge technologies**. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates with:
  - **InfluxDB** (external time-series database) for structured data persistence,
  - **ActiveMQ** (external message broker) for **pub/sub-based communication** between physical and digital components.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar demonstrates integration with:
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (e.g., cloud services for simulation, prediction, and visualization),
  - **AutomationML** (industry-standard for **model-driven engineering and interoperability** in construction/automation domains),
  - **Raspberry Pi sensors** (external IoT devices for real-time data ingestion).
  Both exemplars rely on **ad-hoc integration patterns** rather than standardized Digital Twin frameworks, with **no explicit mention of enterprise system integration (e.g., ERP, MES)** or **cross-Digital Twin coordination protocols**. The **gantry crane system** (logistics domain) is not detailed enough to infer integration specifics, but its alignment with **C4 Model architecture** suggests potential for **modular integration** with **cyber-physical system (CPS) components** (e.g., container tracking systems, warehouse management software). **Interoperability standards** are only explicitly mentioned for **AutomationML** in the Air Quality Management exemplar, while other systems use **proprietary or lightweight protocols** (e.g., ActiveMQ, Azure APIs). Dependencies on external systems are **minimal and use-case-driven**, with no evidence of **federated Digital Twin architectures** or **standardized data exchange formats** beyond AutomationML."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to **AutomationML** for Digital Twin modeling (as used in the **Air Quality Management exemplar**) and employs the **C4 Model** for architectural documentation. Interoperability is ensured via an **MQTT Broker** (specifically **Eclipse Mosquitto**) for signaling between components, while **Microsoft Azure tools** are used in the Air Quality exemplar for pipeline implementation. No explicit mention of additional standards (e.g., OPC UA, ISO 23247) or certification frameworks is provided in the documents."
]
